The '''Mobquet Crawler''' was a ground vehicle made by [[Mobquet Swoops and Speeders/Legends|Mobquet Swoops and Speeders]] and considered 'very old' by [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. It had trapezoidal treads, a low profile, and small engines.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]
